resources.title: What Is a Vector Database?
resources.notes: Authoritative beginner-friendly overview: embeddings, similarity search, use cases

resources.title: What is vector search?
resources.notes: Covers distance metrics (cosine, Euclidean, inner product) and how similarity search works

resources.title: Vector Databases 101: A Beginner's Guide to Vector Search and Indexing
resources.notes: Step-by-step: from raw data → embedding → indexing → ANN search

resources.title: Understanding Hierarchical Navigable Small Worlds (HNSW)
resources.notes: Plain-language explainer of HNSW — the dominant ANN index algorithm used in production vector DBs
